description: Section-by-section migration of the ADMIN (company admin) dashboard from Laravel/Inertia to Next.js.

tasks.title: Define admin dashboard data needs and API/server data loading
Implement admin dashboard layout with stat cards and shortcuts
Add i18n and permission-aware visibility for dashboard widgets
Roles: Next.js pages (list, create, edit) and API routes for CRUD
Roles: Role-permission matrix UI and save logic
Users: Next.js pages (list, create, edit, show) and API routes
Users: Change-password and impersonation flows
Users: Login history (and optional all-logs) page
Permission checks on all User Management routes and components
Sales proposals list page with filters, pagination, actions
Create proposal page and form (line items, totals, client)
Edit proposal page reusing form logic
View proposal page (read-only) with print action
API routes for proposals CRUD and print
Sales invoices list with filters, post action, print
Sales invoice create/edit form (warehouse, products, services)
Sales invoice view and print
Sales returns list and create flow
Sales return show with approve/complete actions
API routes for sales invoices and returns
Purchase invoices list, create, edit, view, post, print
Purchase returns list, create, view, approval flow
Warehouses CRUD pages and API
Transfers list, create, show, delete
API routes for purchase, warehouses, transfers
Verify Media Library Next.js parity (upload, list, delete, filters)
Fix missing API or upload flow and permissions
Messenger layout (conversation list + thread view)
List conversations and load thread messages via API
Send message and real-time or polling updates
New conversation / user selector
API routes or proxy for messenger endpoints
Verify ticket list, create, view, reply, category CRUD parity
Permission checks and company-scoping for helpdesk

sections.title: Section 9: Plan / Subscription (Plans, Coupons, Bank Transfer, Orders)

tasks.title: Verify plans CRUD, subscribe, start-trial, assign-free, apply-coupon
Verify coupons CRUD and usage
Verify bank transfer list, approve, reject, update
Verify orders list and show
Company-scoped and permission checks for plan section
Audit all Laravel settings tabs and map to Next.js
Ensure each settings tab has Next.js UI and API and permissions

syncInstructions: Use CodeSpring get_project_features and create features per section, then get_tasks/update_task_status or add tasks via API. When sync_prd is available, sync PRD-Admin-Dashboard-Migration.md as the PRD content.
